nodes.name: iceberg_table.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for the iceberg_table catalog entries.

nodes.name: index.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for the index catalog with associated table, columns, and index items.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Barrel module for all meta SeaORM entity models.

nodes.name: object.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for the generic object catalog entry with type, owner, and database scope.

nodes.name: object_dependency.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for object dependency tracking between catalog items.

nodes.name: prelude.rs
nodes.summary: Prelude re-exporting all meta model entities for convenient import.

nodes.name: schema.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for schema (namespace) catalog objects.

nodes.name: secret.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for secret catalog entries storing encrypted credentials.

nodes.name: session_parameter.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for session-level parameters.

nodes.name: sink.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for sink catalog entries with format, connector, and target table fields.

nodes.name: source.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for source catalog entries including CDC and connector configuration.

nodes.name: streaming_job.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for streaming job entries with job status and definition fields.

nodes.name: subscription.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for subscription catalog entries.

nodes.name: system_parameter.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for system-level configuration parameters.

nodes.name: table.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for table catalog entries with schema, columns, and engine fields.

nodes.name: user.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for user accounts with authentication and privilege fields.

nodes.name: user_default_privilege.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for default privilege grants for new objects.

nodes.name: user_privilege.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for explicit user privilege entries.

nodes.name: view.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for view catalog entries with SQL definition.

nodes.name: worker.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for worker node entries with address, type, and resource fields.

nodes.name: worker_property.rs
nodes.summary: SeaORM model for worker node property key-value pairs.
